infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Sharm Eats uses your location to assign nearby deliveries and share your live position with customers while you deliver.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Sharm Eats shares your live location with the customer while a delivery is in progress, so they can track their order.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Sharm Eats shares your live location with the customer while a delivery is in progress.
